title: Regulating Act
shortDescription: First intervention of British Parliament; created GG of Bengal.
importance: Foundation of central administration in India.

title: Charter Act
shortDescription: GG of Bengal became GG of India; centralized administration.
importance: Complete end of EIC's commercial monopoly.

title: Government of India Act
shortDescription: Transferred power from EIC to British Crown; created Viceroy.
importance: Began the era of direct British Crown Rule.

title: Government of India Act (Mont-Ford)
shortDescription: Introduced Dyarchy in provinces and Bicameralism at center.
importance: First introduction of direct elections in India.

title: Government of India Act
importance: Major structural blueprint for the 1950 Indian Constitution.

title: Constitution Enforced
shortDescription: Fundamental Rights (Part III) come into force.
importance: India becomes a Republic with guaranteed civil liberties.

title: 44th Amendment Act
shortDescription: Deleted Right to Property from Fundamental Rights.
importance: Property right downgraded to a mere legal right (Article 300A).
